title: ITALY enforcement action against Comune di Campo Calabro (6,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 6,000 on the Comune di Campo Calabro. The controller published documents containing the personal data of employees, including information about their work performance. Legal basis: Art. 5 (1) a), c) GDPR, Art. 6 GDPR.
dedupKey: italy enforcement action against comune di campo calabro 6 000|2026-04-17
